text: I have had nothing but bad customer service.  Not one person from t mobile can help. It's always a wait. Trying to unlock MY tablets I OWN they won't do it. Very bad experience with t mobile and would never use them. This has been the worst ever.

I purchased an insurance plan that includes a screen protector replacement. For the past 6 months, the stores here in Folsom CA don't carry enough inventory of the screen protector they sold in the plan so after three trips to different stores, I was sent to 611 Customer Care to order it. The first time, it went fine. Today, I did the same and the T Mobile representative tells me he isn't authorized to do so, although I explained T Mobile did the same back in December. He insisted I go to the T Mobile Stores that already told me they dont have an inventory of the screen included in the plan I purchased.

Then the rep tells me he is looking at other stores as far as 45 min away! THis after 30 ,min on the 
phone. Absolutely unacceptable response and my issue isn't resoled yet.

It started with me just wanting to change my phone carrier. The kid on the line was really great and assured me I could keep my phone number, and they would even send me a tablet for $16 a month. I was happy and figured t was taken care of. Boy was I wrong!
 I got an email telling me my new phone numbers (1st mistake) then they locked me out so I can't call anyone. It's been 5 days with no phone service. So I looked up TMobile stores on Google. Very misleading because the first 2 were metro or something else. Finally made it to the mall and they tried to help but in the end told me to return the tablet, get a cheap phone so I could at least call someone. I couldn't even get them to call customer service. So now I am out $77 for T mobile, and $55 for a trac phone, which I can't set up. I will never sign up with TMobile after this wild goose chase. No Sim card, nothing but tablet (without a guide) and a sim card for the tablet. Which I can't use. I am done!!!

TERRIBLE. I had sprint for 15 years with no problems. T-Moble has taken something good and ruined it. TERRIBLE service, TERRIBLE customer service, TERRIBLE in store experience, TERRIBLE speed of return on repair items. At this point a dollar store pre paid phone would give you better results.
Great customer service
Terrible customer service hotline. Inexplicable delays, no online alternative, antagonistic design to lead to data overages. Major downside of an otherwise good cell company.
T Mobile has gone down hill since they bought Sprint. customer service is poor. that's what happens when a company gets to big. sad because I liked T Mobile.

I’ve been a customer of Tmobile for four years and recently fell behind due to covid on my bill. When I went to catch back up on my past due balance and resume services I was told that I needed to pay $263 of the $503 I was past due in order to have my phone turned back on. When I made the payment I was then told they were unable to turn my service back on without an additional $400 deposit. I’m struggling already and this is how they treat people in the middle of an international crisis. Do yourself a favor and choose a different carrier. These people are completely unrealistic don’t value their customers and are simply money hungry.

Don't Switch to T-Mobile.  They give TERRIBLE SERVICE!  I was trying to switch from Verizon.  When I couldn't switch my SIM card and wanted to Cancel, Jonathan said I needed a Passcode, which they Didn't give me when I joined 1/12.  He said to go to a store.  I went to 2 which were Closed due to COVID!

Finally I was able to put in my SIM card and was Finally routed, after talking to 5 'Expert' reps, to Transfer my service.  Then they had Trouble switching me from Verizon account # to keep my same cell #.  Have to wait Forever!  Transfer is now having problems.  Don't know if I will get Any service at All from T-mobile or Verizon.  Stuck in a Bad place!

I joined TMobile from Sprint 2016. In 2020 updrafts iPhone 11 it’s been nothing but stress. 2 mos can’t receive or make calls. Online a piece of ignorance  went to TMobile store waited over an hr. Guy deleted ALl my info calls made and recd but everything g GONE. He said it’d return in 24 hrs that was two days ago. I called TMobile got more runaround they put me with another ‘expert’ what BS. This phone is a lemon ppl
once you buy phone throw you under the bus. I’m taking this to BBB

I would give them zero stars if I could....
Yesterday I purchased a phone through T-Mobile. I updated my address before the purchase, a page confirming said address never appeared. ( Every phone on my plan [my family] got a text about the address update) Once I clicked to view details it showed it was being shipped to my old address. I immediately called T-Mobile. They said they couldn’t change the address or cancel the order because within the hour of the purchase and the call wait time...it was already pulled and on it’s way to ups (there’s the first red flag). Finally the representative I was speaking to SHAWN, said we could cancel the order. Then went back to say he couldn’t do anything until the phone has a tracking number - that I have to call ups to cancel the order, even after they already charged my card. After that he hands me off to a higher up DYLAN, who once I exampled the exact above story, said well you sure you changed the address - then hung up. After which we called them again and spoke to a new representative Brittany, who said to call UPS that it wasn’t T-mobiles fault.( Second Red flag) TODAY, I got a text notification that the phone shipped. In which I called ups - which wouldn’t let me speak to a live agent at first. Also called T-mobile letting them know & the representative SHAWN/JON put us on a 3 way call, THEN PRETENDED TO BE A DIFFERENT PERSON SAYING THE CALL FAILED!! (Third red flag) If you are on a 3 way call and the call fails - IT ENDS IT FOR EVERYONE. Thankfully I can say when I did get a hold of UPS they said they will fix it.

I am having the same issue with terrible service. We have had 3 of T-mobile IPhones 11 for about a year now. We have almost no service without wi-fi.  If you don’t have wi-fi you are stuck with a buffering phone .
and dropped calls gall-or.. 
I am in Naples Florida and live with in a couple miles of 3 locations.
I have the unlimited plan on 3 phones.
The over amped advertising is a huge lie. I can’t wait until my 2 year contract is up.. NO MORE T-MOBILE And so called SPRINT MERG...BAD BAD BAD.
Actually it is really embarrassing to have such bad phone service...

Terrible service, Tmobile makes me lose money and they lock you into your contract, so you screwed when tryna leave even though there is no service on your phone, i have no issues when connected to wifi "go figure". othere than that it stays without service. Horrific experience trying to use this service for a buisness, dropped calls, lost signal and no service

i hate tmobile. watch your accounts daily. you never know if you have service. As they use this lie of we upgraded to towers to distract your attention from the truth. So many times all family plan lines not receive service. i hate this company with a passion.

They offer to pay off your phone, but don't be fooled. 3 months in and I have made 3 calls and have been on hold for hours at a time. First they sent an electronic card and when I tried to use it it was declined. Second call they said they mailed a check, no check received. Third call on hold for an hour. They said their rebate dept. doesn't have enough information to process the request. I am so frustrated with this company. Looks like I am going to have to move to another service provider.

DO NOT SIGN UP WITH THESE GUYS. If there was a 0 star that would be my choice. I wanted to purchase an international data plan and these guys had me transferred to 4 different people while I was waiting for an hour. Asked to speak to manager to see what was going on and got a sales person. They have the worst customer service I have ever had and I'm so glad I caught it before I switched over to this nightmare of a company. My advice: DONT DO IT.

I was at 75 Middlesex Turnpike, Burlington Ma T-Mobile shop yesterday.  I was treated with very intolerance behavior by 2 Michaels and the store manager Kerry.  The younger Michael was helping me but the older Michael was answering for the younger Michael and he was trying to dismiss me and told me to go down the mall to the next T-Mobil shop! I told the older Michael I have been a customer for almost 6 years and never had trouble before. When I con't asking technical help from the younger Michael, the older Michael told me to call 911. I asked to speak to the store manager but the younger Michael walked into her office behind close door to brief her by the time she came out to see me her face was red, she looked upset with her hand in her waist I thought she was going to push me out the store.  True to my observation she refused to listen to my side of the incident, walked back to her office and called the mall security.  The manager and two security came and the manager told me they told him that I was not wearing a face mask and 3 people can contest to that statement and I did not keep a safe distance from others.  I am a 73 years old Chinese American, weigh110 lbs with arthritic hands and worked 42 as a Registered nurse and now they accused me not wearing a face mask while my face mask was right in front of my nose. I am the senior citizen and the virus kills more elderly than the young. Am I stupid enough to go out of my house into a store without a face mask??? While I was out the store calling T Mobile customer service another older Asian woman came to the store but she was not allowed to go in.  The younger Michael came out and talked to her outside the store and she left.  They also told the manager and the mall security that they were scare of me and I am not allow to go back to the store again!!! Remind me in the 1960's during our Civil Rights Movement and I was going to tell them to bring on the dogs and the water hoses,too!  Somehow all three of them reminded me the take over scenes in our Capital on cable TV lately.  Remember before we have the cell phones to video our policemen.  They always always always justified their shooting our Black men by the reason that they were SCARE!!!

It's a horrible company, trying to rip you of as much as they can, and if you catch them, they play stupid...they can't be trusted at all and give them an auto pay option. 
Every month they have diffrent bill for you. It all surprises. Very sad.

Terrible and Untrustworthy! "Account executives" and over the phone "management" will pretend to resolve issues T-Mobile has created, and not follow up as promised. T-Mobile stores will also never be on the same page as over the phone information provided.

I have been with T-Mobile for 6 months. It was a big mistake switching from AT&T. I purchase a OnePlus 8 smartphone from them. Had nothing but problems. Their Technical Support is a big joke. Every time I call no one is able to help me, so they transfer me to a OnePlus 8 representative in India. These people doesn't seem to have a clue either.

I just got the S20 FE. I have been a sprint custmer sence they came back and on the family plan and have 5 lines. Well I up graded from the S5 and never had a problem so when I got my phone I didn't put insurance on it, but called later on and put insurance on the phone because could not find a case for it. When I did this its time for the holidays and was taking a picture and the dog ran into me and I dropped my phone.  The insurance and t moble and sprint customer service has been very bad. Nothing but the run around even though I had insurance before the accident happen. No one is willing to help. Thinking about going to another company because of the bad service.

I had Tmobile in in 2019 then moved and my service was HORRIBLE. Tried to cancel, they insisted on sending me a stupid booster signal tower thing, it did nothing. Then my brand new maybe 2 months old, lg phone went into a black hole. I contacted the company, the man on the phone stated that those phones are known for that. But yet it was still pitched and sold to me. So I switched to At&t, had great service, bill was cheaper. I canceled my plan, they wouldnt accept my cell phone. They refused to take it back. Finally sept of 2019 I sent back the tower, they finally paid for shipping and Dec 2019 I got an email stating they received the tower. I called and spoke with another rep who asked for that phone back and my account cleared and removed from my credit. Now Jan 2021. I received a bill from a collection agency amd Tmobile wont answer any questions. They tell me to refer to the collection agency with all questions. Worst company. Horrible customer service. Lesson learned. Always ask for documentation and save it all!!!

I canceled my line and returned the item in T-Mobile Duluth highway Lawrenceville Georgia Atlanta branch ,that was weeks ago ,I never use the line and the phone ,returned no damages and sealed.I paid restocking fee.
Today T-Mobile auto-pay took my money of my bank account $113 dollars .
That’s was so insane not acceptable being careless they should review first all customer file before taking money from me .

Terrible customer service, fees that are not disclosed to the customer. The guy I spoke with interrupted me and said it's a ten dollar fee to talk with him after the fact. He also said it's a ten dollar fee to make a payment arrangement.....I did not know this and was not told. Seems like bad business and a nickel and dime scheme in the midst of the present economic crisis. Just awful! Run......don't do it

I went into a T Mobile on Long Island to add myself to someone’s existing plan with a new line. I tried asking about multiple new iPhones and promotions in order to save cost. Eventually they recommended the iPhone SE, without explaining its significantly downgraded features. 

I tried multiple times to get them to break down how much it would cost, and all I was ever given was random guesstimates that employees came up with on their phone. Eventually I was told the phone would cost me about $100 to activate. Still without explaining how that number was calculated, and increasingly asking me if I’m going to activate it or not, I said fine. I was then told the phone would cost $225 dollars to activate and I was shocked. 

Without running a credit check, I was told my down payment would be $120 dollars, close to half of the retail cost. They wouldn’t explain where that # came from, just that “it was on the computer.” Along the entire way I felt pressured into purchasing the phone. They rationalized the extreme over charging by saying the $120 would reduce my monthly payments to $3 dollars a month for the the device. I still didn’t understand where this $225 dollar charge was coming from, but I felt nervous and confused, and pressured into buying the phone. Once I got the receipt, I found that they added a third line, and charged me $20 to activate it. I was also charged multiple “Assistance Fees” that were never spoken about or explained. 

Later I went to a Best Buy Mobile to ask them whether this experience made sense. They told me the down payment made little sense and should never have been that high. They also realized when examining the phone that it didn’t connect to the internet, because the SIM card they installed wasn’t even functional. They also found that the person whose plan I was going to join was paying monthly for a screen protector she did not have, and on an upgraded data plan she didn’t ask for. 

We went back to the T-Mobile and returned the device. They told me the money would be back in my account on the next business day but it has yet to be deposited. I was contacted by a customer service representative but she has yet to respond to my emails. I feel so stolen from and taken advantage of. I was even charged a restocking fee for a phone that wasn’t out of the plastic, and didn’t have a working SIM. I have never left a review before, but I hope this serves as a warning. DO NOT give these thieves your money.
I received excellent customer service in Bristol CT from Shakira.  I was adding a free line.  I was happy she new what she was doing.  Very friendly and fast.

I just installed t-mobile home internet service,couldn't use the app(I don't have a t-mobile phone) and can't access my account.I was put on hold for a tech for over one hour.There's not chat for help,and no e-mail to reach anyone.Finally the lady I spoke to, sent me an e-mail and told me that would resolve the issues I encountered.All the wait for one e-mail,it's really a shame.
Please make sure u ASK QUESTIONS ABOUT EVERYTHING!! They got BS with them!!
I cant believe t mobile even said have experts that could help. After 2 hours of waiting i just hang up. This company will go out of business real soon.
I truly believe best service around

We switched from Verizon because of the high prices and they lowered my bill by 80$ for the wife and I we have also dropped direct tv and have the TVision app and we get there highest package for 50$ with auto pay and that would cost 120$ with direct TV haven’t had any issues or dropped calls. They call me back when I have a question or will text me. Completely happy with my choice so far

T mobile website is always failing. Even the autopay, and when I want to refill my account also fails.
I need to go to the stores to refill it.
It is the worst web site I have ever used. And, t mobile is a huge company they should improve it.

Tmobile states they are a better company after the sprint merge but I have experience that this is not true. I switched 4 lines from another provider because tmobike representative promised me a certain amount for my monthly bill, 4 free phones, and insurance on 2 of the 4 phones. I agreed only after conversation with this representative for 45 minutes and accepting the promises. I git the 4 phones in the mail quickly. I received my first bill only 1 week later and bill was $50 higher than promised. Also the phones they gave us were promised to work great with no issues. They gave us 4 galaxy a11, with ads installed unable to remove. The phones are junk here it is 2 months later and I have to buy 4 new phones. Ridiculous. Don't believe anything representatives tell you, they will lie to you just to get your business.

edits.text: Switched from another provider after speaking to a customer service representative. He promised me many things to get me to switch to tmobile with my 4 accounts. Told me my monthly bill would be $117, got my first bill it was $164. Promised me free insurance for 2 out of 4 phones, they charged me for the insurance, told me they were giving me 4 Samsung A11s for switching to them, the phones were refurbished and had ads installed in them unable to Uninstall. He promised me the phones would stream well and would have no problem streaming videos all day long with no problem, can barely open Google. I'm very upset at the lies this company has told me. Do not believe anything they say to you, they will tell you whatever you want to hear until they get you to join them.

text:
As a T-mobile subscriber for 3yrs the service was always good never been hold for long time at all, and they always fix my problem but guess what???...

This time since mostly people are unemployed and didn't receive benefits from the govt since you runout of the unemployment. I'm planning to change my carrier and find some cheaper but good carrier. Now, i was trying to reach out to T-mobile through call but says it will take 1-2 hrs to talk to representative so i leave my number but for 3x, you know why? because i waited enough for 2 hours and nobody call me back. So when i finally talk to representive I did tell her that i wanted to cancel my T-mobile and she was like "ok sure, let me hold for second and check your info" so i was like okey. But she didn't tell me it will take a long wait. "IM GUESSING THAT THEY DONT WANT YOU TO CANCEL THE T_MOBILE!!" so i'm still waiting till it turned 30mins exactly and then suddenly END MY CALL!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! This is unbelievable and dissapointed in their service! I wouldn't be back again never TMOBILE!!

We have been with Tmobile for 4 years and recently we have had a HORIBLE experience.  We can't get our problem resolved.  We are transferred from one number to the next number with long wait times an hour every time we call.  Their customer service is HORRIBLE they don't seem to want to help and they have attitudes.
T-Mobil is the worst company ever.  Sprint was great this is the worst merger in history 10 year plus customer soon as i get back to the states I'm cancelling!

HORRIFIC!  The service (call quality) is the WORST that I have had from any company in well over 10 years.  It's like the olden days of cell phones, when there were few towers and service was spotty.
My phone is a work phone and I have to be on it talking to customers ALL DAY.  Most of the time lately, people can't hear me, the call breaks up constantly, calls drop, and when we ARE connected, it goes in and out and in and out.  I can barely use this damn phone.  It can ONLY be the network, as since problems began, I have moved 3 hours north, gotten a new phone, AND a new SIM card, and STILL the problems persist!
Terrible!!!! Worst carrier I have ever had! Never have service!!! Cannot clock in for work on time because of bad service. Do not get.

Total scam. Switched from Verizon to TMobile back in November 2020 and did the buy an iphone 12 get one free. Well, its not free. They nickle and dime you. Now they are charging 6.49 per month for the SIM card. What a damn joke.

HORRIBLE customer service!!!  I attempted to replace my internet provider with their home internet and got terrible service.  I called the next day to return it, but they didn't follow through on e-mailing me a return label.  I called again (each time on hold for OVER an hour) to be hung up on after waiting over 2 hours.  Finally, they e-mailed a return label which I then shipped out the next day.  2 bills later and many phone calls with lots of hours on hold...it STILL isn't cleared up.  DO NOT USE THIS COMPANY!!!!  They are nothing but a pain in the butt to deal with!!!!!!

you people should be sued for fails advertisement your company should be band from saying you have the best coverage serves in the united states they super super  lairs just get your business and lie to you when they have your business they do not want to try and fix the problem they make it look like your dumb and uneducated with the questions they ask people should not waste there money on this company are any company thats partnered with tmobile

T-Mobile IS BY FAR, THE WORST MOBILE PHONE COMPANY I HAVE EVER DEALT WITH!!

If you are considering switching from another carrier over to T-Mobile you had better read all the reviews first on this company. I wish I had done that. This company is Very Dishonest to people and their service is the worst. CROOKS!

Their customer service is the worst ever and their cell phone coverage it’s horrible. They will flat out lied to your face and say anything to get you to switch to their service once you’re in their store. 

My wife and I switched from Verizon to T-Mobile, had the service for one month (which was too long) and switched back to Verizon due to very poor customer service and terrible phone coverage.

edits.text:
FAIR WARNING - If you are considering using T-Mobile for the first time OR switching your from you current cell phone provider, read on.

My wife and I switched from Verizon over to T-Mobile four weeks ago. On week 4 1/2 we went back to Verizon.

T-Mobile is by far the worst cell phone carrier for both coverage and Customer Service both are the Absolute worst I have ever dealt with. They are rude over the phone assuming you can actually get a person to take you call And their cell phone coverage is horrible. 

They will lie to you looking you straight in the face at any of their stores just to make a sale. My little transaction cost me over $1,300. 

No matter how bad you think your current cell phone provider is, I urge you to keep looking at all the reviews of T-Mobile (something I wish I had done). Many more very bad reviews than good ones.

text: I can't get service in my home and have lots of spotty service issues! I have complained many but they don't care!!!!

I would like to give them 0 but it won't let you. Not only do they have EXTREMELY, SPOTTY...., but the customer service you get from them, is awful. You wait and wait if they don't hang up on you,then they wont listen they explain and tell you what what is... in other words everything you say or question is never heard. When you try to leave they make it a misery, but if you stay you aren't offered the same deals as new customers. Sprint was great, Sprint was nice, Sprint was super to deal with, so sorry Sprint got bought ....

Be aware of their promotions! They tell you when they receive your old phone they will credit your account, but never do and say the promotion is over. T-mobile is a scam and just wants to take your money and lock you in on a plan.

T-Mobile offers the most straight-forward billing (no hidden fees and unrecognizable charges like many of the competitors) and was one of the first to offer a truly unlimited talk and data plan. The downside of T-mo has been their sometimes spotty service in certain areas. As long as they continue to expand their network, they will continue to be great.

Wish I had read these reveiws before switching from Verizon.  Customer service was great when I was looking to switch, but as soon you log in to the chat box, they must redirect you to the newbies on the customer service team.  I'm currently on hold after being transferred three times, each time the person saying, this is the wrong department, you need the techical department.  After the third transfer I was put what appears to be back in the original call queue listening to the worst music I have ever heard while on hold.  It's hurting my ears....very disappointed.  Two weeks in regretting my decision to switch.

Hey I Just received some outstanding customer service from T-Mobile 16205 S. Harlem, Tinley Park Illinois.  The people they are very friendly and knowledgeable they help us with our problem.  And were able to take care of all needs.  I would highly recommend this Store for anyone that need assistance with their team mobile accounts. And new customers.

This is the worst company! Zero stars.
They sent me a sim card that crashed my phone. When I removed the sim card and replaced the AT&T sim card my phone worked perfectly. I re-installed the T-Mobile sim card and this time my phone froze on the T-Mobile screen and it would not respond to any input.
I called customer service to cancel my account and they said the only way they could discontinue service is if they send a code to the phone-which was useless. These people have no idea what they are doing! They sent me to the local T-Mobile store and Matt at the store told me I was wasting my time he was unable to perform any cancellation of service on his end-he actually demonstrated his lack of capability to me on the house computer.  Then they took my "autodraft" payment for the first month even though my account wasn't set up. They will actually snicker on the phone at you when they see what a bind they put you in!
I had to contact my credit card company to actually have T-Mobile blocked from charging my account and charges reversed. 
Buyer beware!!!
Update:
They are still trying to bill my account! 
They threaten to report you to credit burau if you don't pay. This is extortion plain and simple.
Class action lawsuit time.

Beware TMobile Offers
On 10/25/20 I contacted T Mobile to trade in my iPhone 6 for a newer model. I was on the phone for over 4 hours. Finally (after numerous holds and transfers) it was decided that I could trade in for the iPhone 12. I was promised $20 a month off my monthly bill and A $200 gift card. It is now 2021 and I have seen neither. You can’t contact them-the wait times are over one and a half hours, and when you request a call back you get a recording that disconnects you. They used to be a reputable company but have become dishonest and unreachable. Beware anything they promise you. I am a long time customer but will be switching as soon as I pay off this overpriced phone.
Horrible. They double charged me a bunch of money multiple times and the app locked me out so I can't request a call. I've currently been on hold 3 hours

If I could give zero stars I would. Went to TMobile in 7/18, purchased new iPhone XS (2) as part of their Christmas promo in 12/18. Fast forward to 2/20 we switch back to Verizon due to lack of service in our area. Dead spots all over. Calls dropping. Texts not working. Service was straight trash. I paid off my TMobile bill in full, and we switched back to Verizon, leaving me with 2 brand new iPhone XS. 10/20 I decide to sell this iPhone XS just sitting in my drawer. I went to TMobile to verify the phone has been unlocked. A service person that their store simply said “here’s the easiest way to tell” and simply took the Verizon SIM card out of my Verizon phone and put it in the TMobile phone, restarted it and it had switched over to Verizon. Cool I sell the phone. Here we are 1/2/2021 STILL TRYING TO GET THIS PHONE UNLOCKED. Now TMobile is telling me my account that wasn’t even closed a year ago cannot be found in the system, and the IMEI of the iPhone doesn’t come up in their system as if they never sold it to me. I have all my documents from purchasing the phones where the IMEI on the paperwork matches the IMEI on the phone. So basically I have to refund this person I sold this phone to, and now I’m stuck with an iPhone XS and the only thing TMobile will do about it is give me a credit if I trade the XS into them and switch back to their service. What on gods green earth would make you think I’d switch back to youd god forsaken company after this. Y’all are a JOKE and shouldn’t even be an option as a cell carrier. You so bad business and you are not truthworthy.

Just wanted to take a minute to commend Garion Williams and Darius Powers at store 2RSS in Lexington, SC.
These two young men when above and beyond helping us and getting the items we needed but observed them handling some very impatient and rude customers.  They handled everyone with respect and eventually helped everyone to the best of their ability during a very busy time in the store.  They were knowledgeable, professional and just a pleasure to work with.

Wish That I didn’t have to pick any stars me and my wife got our kids timex watches for Christmas, one ended up not connecting and so we had to trade it in and we had to do this three different times and we have been trying since the day after Christmas and finally today we got them to let us take them back and get different watches. We ended up getting them both apple watches and now guess what yup you guessed it same fu_king thing one watch doesn’t work I am going to leave T-Mobile more than likely!!!!

After experiencing a problem with our Sprint phones, my husband & I decided it was time for new phones. We went to the T-Mobile store in Greece-Ridge Mall, store #350. We were greeted and waited on by Justin.  As we are senior citizens, the newer technologies can seem a little daunting.  Justin was the epitome of a excellent salesman, very patient and knowledgeable about our new phones. Even after we returned home and phoned him numerous times he never showed us anything but professionalism, if he was unable to take our call, he was very prompt in returning it.  This young man made a challenging purchase much easier.  We will encourage any of our friends wishing to upgrade their phone to go to T-Mobile and ask for Justin.  Eileen Klemz
this company is a fu*king joke. we have been loyal customers with them for like 10+ years. they wont unlock my paid off phone because THEIR system lost it.

My phone was dropped and broke.   That was in October.   They said I could have a replacement phone shipped over night.  It took three weeks to get the phone.  When I sent the old phone back, I'm glad I kept my tracking number because they don't have it after a month.   Now they're going to turn off my service because I haven't paid the $623 for the phone I sent back.     If I pay it, then they won't give me the money back.    They already are recording me as two months behind even though I have auto pay and pay them the same amount each month like clock work.  When I asked to speak to a supervisor, I got "Neal" in a call center in India who basically told me to print my bill and told me the phone was recorded and turned in.   I stated it's still listed as not turned in and that's why my bill was so high.  He told me it was because I missed a payment.    I have not.   So he told me I'm two months behind and they were turning off my service on all seven phones on January 5, 2021.    We left Sprint eight years ago for this very situation and they said Sprint wasn't going to be setting policy.   Seems to me they have.  They also don't have many customer service folks.   You have to call and they'll call you back hours later.
This very interested site of any age person

I broke my phone and sprint had absolutely no way of helping cancel my account. I have to go thru my bank to make sure no payments come out of my account from sprint because they refuse to help me cancel my account and I can't login online without my phone! Don't use sprint if you like to give away your money for free and get absolutely nothing in return! Bs service and a horrible company if you ask me. Will make sure the word gets around. Happy new year.

My iPhone 10XR was stolen on 11/19/20. I wasn’t able 
anyone to disable my phone that was stolen on this date. I went into a T-Mobile
store the next morning: 11/20/20 to buy another phone and deactivate my stolen
phone. I was told by the person helping me that I needed to call the service
department at T-Mobile. I called at approximately 10:45am as soon as I was
done buying the phone. The service rep I talked to told me that my stolen phone
was wiped and that no one would have access to my stolen phone.
A couple days later, on 11/22/20,I received an email from T-Mobile to my
personal email  stating that my pin was removed from my
phone and that I have access to my phone by fingerprint. I thought it was odd so
I called T-Mobile and let them know what the email I had received stated and
they checked my accounts at approximately 10pm on 11/22/20.
At this time I spoke with the supervisor on shift at T-Mobile (Ela)and she told
me that indeed, my stolen phone was not disabled that someone had access to
it. All of my personal information was breached: Social security card, license,
banking information and all my credit card apps, my work credit card and vital
information for my work (HIPPA regulated) all highly sensitive patient information.
Myself, my company and my clients have been violated.
I also noticed that my Facebook account was logged in to a device that
wasn’t mine in another city. I noticed my Walmart account had charges about
$800 that I didn’t make on it either.
I have been violated privacy and funds upwards of $10,000.00. We can settle
this or my attorney can. The agent on the phone admitted your company
dropping the ball and taking full responsibility for her negligence and told
me she would be reaching out to me to resolve the matter on Friday 12/4/20.
I reached back out on Saturday 12/5/20 and I got the run around of course but
I will not let this go unnoticed. I’ve reached out numerous times and they
admitted their wrong doing. My patience is lost, I am seeking legal alternatives. I
spoke to a female named Nicole on Monday 12/7/20 and she tried to offer me 20
and I declined. HIPPA law alone should explain why this breach is unacceptable.
I've made many attempts to resolve this matter with T-Mobile but continue to get 
the runaround so I want action to be taken.

They keep you on hold forever. They say you have your own team of experts, but they are never any help and they don't speak clear English.They don't record your conservations like they say they do. All they do is lie especially Ed.

Hello my name is Jackie Johnson. I've been a tmobile customer for years. I took my mom in 2 weeks ago for a problem with her phone. Tmobile at 1921-2 Gallatin Pike Madison TN. A young man by the name TRAVELLE  MARSHALL  helped us. His manners were great! He was very patient and knew his stuff. He also said he was new to the job. I think if you had more good employees like this Tmobile could be a better place. Please recognize this young man. Thank you!!

I must commend John Motley the T-Mobile Manager in Atlanta West End store.  I switched my business lines from Sprint to T-Mobile on 21Dec20 after being on the phone with customer service for 3 hours with no resolution.  Mr. Motley was very patient and took his time with me while servicing other customers in the store and on the phone.  He was also coaching two new trainees in the store at the same time. He exemplified exceptional professionalism throughout the 2 hours I was in the store.  He stayed on hold with customer service until he was able correctly switched my phone over to T-Mobile.  
I called Mr. Motley again on 28Dec20 because my second line was disconnecting the main line. He saved me from returning to the store and worked with customer service again for 2 hours to resolved the issue.  Mr. Motley needs to be compensated for adding value to the West End store.   Mr. Motley! Thank you, for your outstanding work ethics.  Landmark REIG

I have been a T-Mobile customer for 17 years. They used to have excellent customer service and then it got average. In the last year their rates are not competitive and the final straw was when they charged us for a phone we did not want. My husband's phone waz not working well so we sent it in under warranty Warranty. We did not think it waz water damage as this phone was designed to go underwater. We had a lot of great videos of the kids swimming underwater. Nonetheless they claimed it was water damage and that we lied when saying we it did not have water damage. They would not send us that phone back instead they sent us a phone of significantly less quality and charged us $660.  I called more than 7 × 2 try and speak with someone and the only thing they would ever do is take notes saying someone would address it or call me back. All I ever got waz a text saying my concern was reviewed and the practice stood. What I hated most was sitting on hold for hours in total listening to the ad stating T-Mobile customers are the most satisfied mobile customers. Ha what a joke! Run, don't join the current T-Mobile program. Ever since T-Mobile merged with Sprint in 2018 things have gotten much much worse!
Not sure what is going on but the past few months have been horrible!!! My service shuts off all the time my calls don't go out or come in and my wifi is terrible looking to get out this service

Worst company on the market today. Tried for 4 days to switch companies to them and got nothing bad wrong advice trying to get me to sign up
They use false advertisement to get other providers customers. That is so wrong to text other providers to get them to switch with wrong information
THEY SUCK and will NEVER go to tmobile
Horrible can’t get service anywhere but random spots 10/10 would not even recommend to my worst enemy

I signed up for the bogo deal and I regret moving from Sprint to tmobile. Service is noticeable worse. 5g is non existent. My 4g with Sprint was faster then my current service.  Run.  Don't trust their lies. 5g phone is worthless.

I tried to switch my carrier from Verizon to T-Mobile. I tried for about 6 days. Turns out the minor (in hindsight) problem that I had with Verizon was insignificant compared to my 6 day experience with T-Mobile. When I called T-Mobile (1-800-T-MOBILE) a message told me that "an expert will assist [you] in more than 2 hours." I was given the option of pressing "1" on my keypad in order to get a callback. I pressed "1" and the message said "Your expert will call you back in more than 2 hours." 
TRY THIS YOURSELF AND SEE!
They don't have any "experts." They have poorly trained employees in the Philippines who should be better trained. T-Mobile was unable to port my old number from Verizon. T-Mobile doesn't know how to do this. I'm back with Verizon now. 
If you think you have a problem with Verizon, don't jump from the frying pan into the fire. T-Mobile is way worse. Save yourself and don't do it. I expect that AT&T is better than T-Mobile.

I don't know what these 1 start reviews are. It's either people not understanding what they are signing up for or fake reviews. I've never experienced better customer service. Yes the employees at the stores are ok but that's every service but the experts when you call are just amazing. White glove treatment.

The T-Mobile is a big scams, terrible customer service. They said I had a qualified for get promoted buy one get one free iPhone 11 Pro Max, after signed up the paperwork then the next bills are alway overpayment because they’re charging both of the iPhone not buy one get one free just like they said . T-Mobile is bullsht scammer.

Terrible service had to get new service after 12 days of being with them! Couldn’t even use Google maps to get around my new city! The representative on the phone even told me the service is bad right now took the phone back canceled the service they charged me a $40 restocking fee! If their service wasn’t terrible I wouldn’t have had to return it! Store employee could care less! DO NOT USE TMOBILE!
4-year customer. Love the customer service and the prices.

Worst customer service. 

I have been with T-Mobile for 5+ years and I recently changed provider because of their service. I had 6 phone lines with them and when I requested T-Mobile to unlock all my devices that have been paid in full for months. They unlocked all for an exception one and I have spend days on the phone with T-Mobile and after 3 weeks and hours and hours on the phone with them still my phone is not unlocked. I even explained to the manager JJ of the call center, that the line is for my mother that has 70+ year for me to get in touch with her in case of an emergency and she didn’t care. My mom is a elderly person and am afraid that something can happen to her and I feel that nobody in T-Mobile care if something happens to my mom. The manager only told me that she can’t do anything and what I have to do is wait 72 hours to get the phone unlock. I explained to her that this is exactly what the last 10 representative have told me and nothing has happen. Am every disappointed on the way T-Mobile has treated me as a loyal customer that have been with them for years. I feel like my time spend at T-Mobile didn’t matter to them. 

If your reading this please take my advice and leave T-Mobile. AT&T is giving better prices and there customer service is better. They actually help you. 

Please help me get my mom phone unlocked by sharing this post.
Wish I could give 0 stars. Has to be the worst website I have ever seen. Also a App that is just as useless. Download it to tell ya it doesnt work..
I really have liked t-mobile for years but their phone customer service has fallen off a cliff the last few months unfortunately.

When I got here I needed a phone and that time I didn’t know what company to choose, I got into this aggressive company from day 1 my life was miserable, in the moments of signing up the contract the girl/lier changed everything what she said before to sign the contract. Then she called the manager/ ogre right there is when I found out that this company is a scammer the whole manager who work there. T-mobile more than bad .They lie to customers/ aggressive people there,, For a moment I felt like if I was in a bar drunk or something like that but I never have been kicked out before neither when you sign a contract. What? Yes  ,,please nobody wants to deals with them , they finally trough me out of the store , I was about to call the cops they are nasty people. This happened in Orem Utah that store in from of the mall , nasty/ nasty people
HORRIBLE THEY DO NOT KNOW WHAT THEY ARE DOING. MY TEAM OF EXPERTS DO NOT SPEAK CLEAR ENGLISH AND VERY DISRESPECTFUL.

I have finally spent enough time with T-Mobile that I can leave an honest review. this has been the worst mobile experience I have ever had and I have only been with T-Mobile for a month and a half. The products I have received in the products I have had to purchase have been nothing short of a constant customer service battle. I have had to spend extra money that I did not intend to and I have spent hours online with customer service I am still having problems. I am going to begin leaving reviews for T-Mobile on different platforms I am so disappointed I cannot believe that I want to go back to cricket wireless. The amount of anxiety time and effort you have caused me to put forth has been astronomical especially in these times.it doesn't matter how many discounts you give me at this point I cannot imagine there is something that you can do that will stop me from the review rampage I'm about to go on. There is nothing more that I would like than to get out of this agreement
Liars and scammers. Tricked me by promising me 20% off my bill. After I joined they hiked my bill back up to full price and refused to give me the discount that was promised.

If there were zero stars, I’d give it. Top to bottom sucks! 1) Poor cell service. The coverage map lies. I’m in the green but get dropped calls ALL the time and need wifi calling enabled TO DO ANYTHING  2) Slow data 3) Terrible customer service....stop frustrating customers with outsourcing to a team that cannot even pull the right customer profile let alone be helpful

I had a mobile hotspot. I upgraded to a higher megabyte ($90 for one month) and cancelled the service after 5 days. They charged me $45 for 5 days and had the nerve to say it was prorated. They are liars and cheats. Beware when dealing with this company.

Worst company ever . Their plans are high and now they are eliminating service to devices that won’t work starting January 29th . Such bull crap !!! I have those devices and once they don’t work T-Mobile can screw off . I’ll go to cricket it’s 4 lines for 100$ unlimited everything so bye bye T-Mobile and hello cricket !!!!!!!!!

edits.text:
Horrible experience. I love T-Mobile but There was 2 reps that messed up on my payment arrangements . I called today and the rep was very rude . Then I called back and got “Maya” rep and her supervisor ELI L rep # 2040757 and they both helped me more then the other reps .

 I spoke with someone earlier that was completely unprofessional and rude towards my situation and was NOT understanding me . I will switch over to cricket but cause of ELI and  “Maya” I don’t want to cause they took care of me so well . 

Other reps that don’t notate a account and just don’t care about a customer like me should NEVER work for T-Mobile because they cause more stress and frustration for their customers that keep T-Mobile running and going as a company . We the people pay our bills and keep T-Mobile going . Their representatives get paid because of US . 

My account has never been suspended in 5 years I have a good record with them and the fact that it took me to speak with someone over seas that understand me more then someone NOT overseas is beyond ridiculous. People deal with a lot of crap and this plandemic has gotten people in different ways . 

 If T-Mobile can guarantee me that I will always have “maya” or Eli” when I call customer care then I will stay if NOT I’ll go to cricket . Cricket has killer deals . 4 lines for 100$ unlimited that T-Mobile can’t beat . I hope T-Mobile investigates my horrible experience and the stress it has caused me . And I hope ELI and Maya notated my account and started investigating this because I write everything down due to my memory loss and constant pain I tend to forget a lot of things . 

Thanx to having a iPhone these days it’s amazing what you can notate and do . Overall beyond horrible experience and it shows with the 1 star reviews on here . Huge huge shout out to “MAYA” and ELI L for being so amazing and taking care of me . 

At least someone understands that the stores are closed and I can’t go in a store and pay cash for my past due balance and I need until tomorrow to pay it .

text: Switched over from verizon for the iphone 12 promotion. I was helped by the employee Randy at the Fullerton CA location. I originally came in with the 8 plus with 128gb on my phone. When I went to trade it in he did the transfer on a new iphone 12 64gb phone and proceeded to not tell me that my phone was not going to be have enough storage once the phone was transfered completely. When I had realized this I said that I wanted the 128gb and that I didn't want to downgrade because I have already set my phone up this way. He then proceeded to tell me that I could come in when It was convienent for me next and that I would be able to trade in my phone without any issues. Now a month later I find out that I had only 2 weeks to make this trade when i was told otherwise. I do not recommend this provider to anyone because they will constantly care more about making the sale than they do with customer satisfaction. I recoomend this provider getting more training on customer service and to hire employees that will tell you EXACTLY what you are getting.

I was with Verizon for forever then switched to save money, you obviously get what you pay for. T-Mobile has terrible service and my phone is constantly slow and won’t load videos. Would not recommend. Leaving T-Mobile as soon as I get in a position to pay the Verizon bill again

Way too frustrating. My cell phone barely works, very slow, texts and calls rarely go through even my emergency calling doesn't work! T Mobile is so crappy, it makes me want to rip my eyes out! I actually rip my hair out because of them! Thanks T Mobile for the stress!

I switched to team mobile to save a couple bucks and was told by team mobile that they would pay off my old contract with Verizon,well 3 months later get a bill from Verizon saying that I owed them 160.00 to pay off contract. Took the bill to team mobile and I was told that that was to pay off my phone,.. THE PHONES WERE ALREADY PAID OFF. As far as I am concerned that is a breach of there contract. And will be switching,
I switched in September 2020 and it's been one thing after another. T-Mobile is the worst cell phone company I have ever had. I thought it was another one but T-Mobile has them beat -1

I have been a loyal customer for over nine years and I have been happy with the service provided until today. I called on 12/17/2020, to order their internet and was told I would receive the equipment within two days. So, I canceled my service with Spectrum on 12/19/2020 and returned their equipment. I  called today to check the status of my order, only to be informed the equipment will not be shipped until 01/04/2021 because the old equipment has been phased out. Which basically mean if I stick with T-Mobile, I won't have internet until the 6th or 10th of January 2021. I 
will return to Spectrum. This is unacceptable customer service.

When I decided to try T-Mobile and entered a store I was lied to from the start with costs and what the monthly bill would be.  When I called customer support they were no better at helping.  They only wanted to give me a $40 credit because they were charging me for two lines.  They also owed for the overcharge of service to the tune of approximately $60.
I’m so pissed I can’t even find the words. Liars, BS, scam, zero customer service. They will NEVER call you back if you schedule a callback. Stay away, even if it costs more!

Wait times are legit the worst! I get a lot of the customer service reps are working from home, but wow. I've tried to call them twice and have each time been waiting for up to an hour to get a hold of someone. This is the second day for me that I've had to wait to get help and its now just hitting over an hour. And all of this is over me just needing them to set up my new SIM card for me. This needs to get better. I've been a loyal customer since the early 2000's, and I don't ever remember it being this bad. Ever.

We have TVison Home, which they are discontinuing. We called about switching to the new service they are offering after receiving an email to call about promos being offered for current customers. We ordered the new hubs and they charged us, even though the email said free. Then when we tried to start service, 6 hours on the phone and 4 different reps and still no resolution or service. Never had such poor service.

T mobile has just gone down hill when it comes to service. I used to be just fine with T-Mobile I would only lose service in more rural areas. There’s several spots in town where I can’t load a thing now. I could be in the heart of town and my phone lies to me and says I have 3 bars but will not load a single thing. The SECOND I pay off this phone and I can get away from t mobile I’m not hesitating for a second, I’m out. I’m so over this company. I don’t pay $100 a month for this line to worry about whether I’m going to have service in the middle of town. It’s absolutely ridiculous.

Ok.. so glad I found this site! Sad I didn’t see it before I bought 4 SIM cards!  I have been SO prepared to jump ship and leave AT&T for T-mobile.  The day I signed up & ordered my SIM cards - I spoke to a knowledgeable girl named Annie from Olathe KS... she gave me all the seamless (sounding) instructions on how to switch over, unlock my phones, port our lines over .. etc.  we spent about 45 mins on the call going over everything , how to get reimbursed etc. 
Once I unlocked the phones, I called the 800 number that Annie gave me - to port over our old numbers and it’s been a COMPLETE FIASCO!!!     For starters - can’t reach America!  For two days I’ve been calling to a call center in the Philippines.  First it was the language barrier .. and I was bounced around 3 different times - I finally gave up yesterday ... and tried back today.. 
Dialed that 800 number and landed back in the Philippines.  The lady there helped a little - then said she was transferring me back to activations - and I was transferred to a girl from Orlando.  Sadly - she wasn’t in activations but she tried to help..  said she would call me back in 30 mins - 
And it’s been 4 1/2 hours later. 🙄 I tried again to activate our 4 phones from the 800 # and  got back to the Philippines again.  I  Had to go through the entire story with her for the 10th time.. only to have her transfer me ... and then I finally hung up.   I’m over it.   I am now questioning everything Annie told me on the first day (this will be a seamless transition.. etc). If it’s THIS hard to port lines over.. can I really trust what she said about the 5g coverage and can I trust that I would get my reimbursement. And all the other “perks” we were supposed to get .. Ie.. Netflix subscription etc????  No thanks! 
Wish I would’ve read all these reviews before I spent $43 on 4 SIM cards.. 
that no one can figure out how to transfer over!  If someone out there is still reading ..  I apologize .. I’m just fed the f—- up and am needing to vent - 
just trying to save the next person from my misery! 🤣
*word to the wise...  if something seems too good to be true..   it probably is!

And the bad experience continues.  If you look at number of called I have had to make to T-Mobile in the last 3 weeks you will see there have been a lot lasting anywhere from 1 to 3 hours.  The final straw was tonight when Alex assured me that he had things covered.  I called to confirm that I would get labels to send back my phone (four in total) and he assured me I only need to send back the Samsung S7 phones.  “no need to send back the iPhones”.  Come to find out, he sent me the same label twice to send back the S7 phones.  So I will need to contact T-Mobile again to get another label.  I also than had him send me the link so I could get the Carrier Freedom reimbursement for the early termination fees and GUESS WHAT (WHAT?) they want the iPhone back.  Your customer experience is awful, the worst, where else can I post the crap I have had to put up with?  I think I know….


So now I am on the phone with another representative the following day 12-18-2020 and I am transferred to the Carrier Freedom Group to see why the number that I want to get the Early Termination Fee’s from is now showing up so I can obtain a check to cover the ETF and he tells me “you don’t qualify because you already got the $100 for switching lines”  NOPE transfer me to a Manager.  17 minutes so far

T-Mobile used tp be a good company, yet they are just another conglomerate, that can't keep up with the modern times of spam and using the system to infiltrate your phone almost on a dialy basis. It happens even om a flip phone, which cannot be hacked. And when you talk to what appears to be their secuirty (of sorts). thay offer you an upgraded security system which is a joke. I have been with T-mobile for twelve years and I am about to go elsewhere. CONSUMER BEWARE!

The T Mobile Network is pretty much garbage. They are more interested in selling phones than providing coverage. When you call to complain they will tell you that they do not guarantee coverage. Garbage Network and no help.

It has been the most terrible experience  I ever had. 
After  few days of shifting from another network,  I had to cancell the line and return the Iphone. There were some concern about the iphone device and the line itself and NOBODY, yes, NOBODY neither from customer care nor  from the 3 different store I went to; were able to give me a solution. At the stores I was treated like I was not their customer because  I closed the deal over the phone. The employees made me  feel like I was not intereresting for them. ( I was a T Mobile Customer). Additionally,  Made more than 8 phone calls to the 611 customer care line and  each  "expert" told me a different story and explanation.  Just one lier more than the other. Finally decided to shift back and return the iphone, few days after, and within the 20 days return policy. Now, I received a bill  and, calling to 611, customer care, I was told that, because I was in auto pay, I have to pay the complete month of service.! Beside, I had to have a telephone line with them so I should not have had cancelled the line before  being charged in my account. What a great answer from that expert.!

I was sent a refurbished phone by Asurant during a Covid pandemic. I went to Tmobile to pick up the phone and the manager and employee tried to scam me and my family. I filed a complaint and never recieved a call back. We have been with Tmobile beyond a decade. The worst scam I've seen to date. I rate you a negative -80.
